_comment: Attention-only phone-ping. Merge these TWO hook entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json under the top-level 'hooks' key. Replace <USER> with your Windows username. The per-turn 'Stop' hook is intentionally OMITTED so your phone does NOT buzz on every turn-end - you get pinged only when Claude asks a question (PreToolUse/AskUserQuestion) or has been idle 60s waiting on you (Notification). To ALSO ping on every turn-end, add a 'Stop' entry identical to the Notification one below. If you already have other PreToolUse entries (linting, guards), add the AskUserQuestion object as an ADDITIONAL item in the PreToolUse array - do not overwrite existing entries. Note: in bypassPermissions mode the Notification hook only fires on the idle-60s case (there are no permission prompts).
